3288680.name: My favorite school
3288680.description:
Synopsis:

You are the most ordinary student of the secondary comprehensive municipal school No. 18, living day after day in the endless routine of school affairs, until one of those days you are unlucky enough to stay after school.

The school and the people you knew before have changed a lot. Now your goal is to understand what is happening and, if possible, not go crazy.

You will meet many unusual characters, personally experience shocking events and find out who is behind all the nightmares.

Features:

Within the walls of My Favorite School, you must:

  • Check the schedule: Walk around the "new" school, interacting with the environment to light your way.

  • Participate in the learning process: Prepare homework and present it to the class.

  • Gnaw the granite of science: Use the objects and clues you find to solve riddles.

  • Do not disturb public order: Listen to teachers, head teachers and the principal, otherwise you will be punished!
3288680.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
